MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jack Lee Fong is present.
Attorney Darius Chan appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Pete Naji is present.
Attorney Alexander Porcaro representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-19-2012 remains on calendar.
